message:
test(wave-40): add 20 pure data-type tests across 4 modules

raptorq/gf256: Gf256 Debug/Display/Default/Clone/Copy/Eq/Hash,
Gf256Kernel, DualKernelMode, DualKernelDecision,
DualKernelPolicySnapshot trait coverage.

lab/runtime: LabTraceCertificateSummary, VirtualTimeReport,
HarnessAttachmentKind (Display/Ord/Hash), HarnessAttachmentRef,
ChaosConfigSummary, ObligationLeak trait coverage.

trace/file: CompressionMode, TraceFileConfig, TraceFileError.

time/wheel: TimerWheelConfig, CoalescingConfig,
TimerDurationExceeded, TimerHandle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
